name: CV/Resume Skill Mapping
description: Process CVs and resumes to extract candidate profile, skills, education, experience, and certifications. Automatically maps extracted skills against role-specific competency requirements to produce a fit score and gap analysis for hiring decisions.

fields.name: total_years_experience
fields.description: Total years of professional experience calculated from work history

fields.name: education_institution
fields.description: Name of educational institution for highest degree

fields.name: technical_skills
fields.description: List of technical/hard skills extracted from CV

fields.name: soft_skills
fields.description: List of soft skills (communication, leadership, etc.)

fields.name: tools_platforms
fields.description: Tools, platforms, frameworks, and software proficiency

fields.name: certifications
fields.description: Professional certifications (e.g., AWS, PMP, CFA, BSMR)

fields.name: work_history
fields.description: Array of work experiences: [{company, title, start_date, end_date, description}]

fields.name: industry_experience
fields.description: Industries the candidate has worked in (banking, fintech, consulting, etc.)

fields.name: target_role
fields.description: The role/position the candidate is applying for

validation_rules.description: Check if candidate meets minimum years of experience for the target role
Validate minimum education level against role requirement
Match candidate technical_skills against required skills for the target role
Match candidate skills against preferred/nice-to-have skills for the target role
Verify if candidate holds required certifications for the role (e.g., BSMR, CFA, PMP)
Check if candidate has relevant industry experience for the position
Identify missing required skills and certifications for the target role
Compare expected salary against the role's salary band if available

skill_matching.description: Scoring methodology for candidate-role fit assessment

fit_levels.recommendation: Consider for interview, minor gaps identified
Significant skill gaps — review if trainable

action_triggers.description: Alert hiring manager of strong candidate match
Add candidate to shortlist in Applicant Tracking System
Flag for recruiter review with gap analysis
Generate ranked candidate list for the position
Check if certification gap can be addressed through training program

nl_prompt: Extract all information from this CV/resume. Identify the candidate's full name, contact details, professional summary, and total years of experience. List all technical skills, programming languages, tools/platforms, and soft skills separately. Extract the complete work history with company names, job titles, dates, and key responsibilities. Identify the highest education level, institution, major, and GPA if available. List all professional certifications with their validity dates. Determine which industries the candidate has experience in. Then compare the extracted skills against the requirements for the target role and produce a fit score with gap analysis showing which required skills or certifications are missing.
